_meta.name: Kappa backtest library
_meta.what: Known UK day-nursery openings where Kappa's model signal is compared to the real post-opening outcome (occupancy / Ofsted), as the accountability track record. Predicted signal is recomputed blind (outcome masked) before comparison.
_meta.note: Representative backtest cases for the demo. In production each row is sourced from publicly trackable Ofsted openings and logged with a timestamp before the outcome is known.

cases.note: Predicted favourable on supply gap, but a competing Outstanding setting opened nearby + a weak Ofsted held occupancy down — a logged miss.
